name: SolarWinds Orion Supply Chain Compromise

victim.description: ~18,000 organizations including US Treasury, DHS, State Department, FireEye, and Microsoft via trojanized SolarWinds Orion updates

infrastructure.description: Trojanized SolarWinds Orion DLL (SUNBURST); avsvmcloud.com C2 via DNS; TEARDROP and RAINDROP second-stage payloads

description: APT29 inserted SUNBURST backdoor into SolarWinds Orion software build pipeline, achieving access to ~18,000 customer networks. Selectively activated implants against high-value targets for espionage over ~9 months before discovery.
